headline: Sedition investigation targets Sarawak autonomy advocates
context: Four Sarawakian activists were investigated under the Sedition Act in 2024 for advocating greater state autonomy under the Malaysia Agreement 1963.

cards.big: 4 Sarawak autonomy advocates investigated for sedition in 2024
cards.sub: Discussing terms of Malaysia Agreement 1963 treated as seditious

cards.big: Sedition Act Section 3 includes questioning constitutional arrangements as seditious
cards.sub: MA63 review is a legitimate political process agreed by federal government

cards.big: MA63 guarantees Sarawak special rights including immigration and land autonomy
cards.sub: Advocates argue these constitutional rights cannot be seditious to discuss

cards.big: 62% of Sarawakians surveyed support greater autonomy under MA63 framework
cards.sub: Sedition investigations chill legitimate public discourse on federalism

cards.big: Criminalising discussion of a constitutional agreement undermines the agreement itself
GPS coalition raised MA63 implementation in Parliament 7 times in 2024
